text.tspan: axial-lead thermal fuses, crimped inline -> spade -> can stud / plenum lid
SSR heatsink: aluminum bar bonded to PE
GPIO 22 in -> R3 (1 k axial) -> Q2 (2N2222) base
Q2 emitter -> GND in; Q2 collector -> SSR 4 out; +5 V in -> SSR 3 out
Chassis earth bus (GRN 14 AWG) - SSR heatsink, panel chassis, can/plenum lugs
Panel Wiring - Zone 2 of 4: HEATER BAY
Both thermal fuses in series upstream of SSR (E6). RC snubber across SSR T1 / T2 (E10).
DRV-BD-001 is a 1 x 2 in protoboard with Q2 + R3 - mounted within 6 in of SSR.
Cable schedule (cables entering / leaving this zone)
